transcript.text:
[Today's Mukbang...]
[A revisit after 2 years!]
[Crazy visuals that will take your breath away]
[Is this heaven?!]
[Casting a spell to make it delicious]
[Chop chop chop chop chop]
[Tak]
[Slowly falling into this magical spell...]
[Crazy!]
She ate all of that...
[Doesn't make sense]
I want to keep watching
[Tzuyang is the best...☆]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jangan-dong to eat some raw crabs
I've been here about 2 years ago

The video is gone now, so I'm back here once again
Over here!
[Ilmi Ganjang Gejang] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
Oh, look here!
That's me!
Hello~
I sat here last time Right in front of the restroom
Thank you
Hello, How have you been?
-I've been well, yourself? -Good
-It's been a while -Yes, almost 2 years
-It's such a bummer -Why?
-Because the video is not up anymore -Right, I loved that video too
Well today, don't eat too much
Eat maybe about 7~8 crabs
Since the Large has 4 crabs,

I'll take 2 Large orders of soy sauce marinated crabs, and 2 Large orders of spicy marinated crabs
-So 16 crabs total... -Thank you
Customers ask if she really eats everything
Some challenge to eat as much
It's not easy
Even for big eaters
It's too much for 1 person
[She does the impossible]
[Ganjang Gejang] (Raw crabs marinated in soy sauce]
[Yangnyeom Gejang] (Raw crabs with spicy sauce)
Thank you
It's plated so nicely Thank you
That's amazing
You had 10 crabs each last time
These crabs are bigger, so the amount should be around the same
[Now for the spicy]

Thank you
Look at the amount
Soybean stew? I love it!
[Happy]
Happy
-Our soybean stew tastes delicious -Really? It has crabs!
Thank you
The stew looks amazing
I love it
Wait, this isn't what I'm here for
That's so good...
Lovely
Now for the raw crabs
It's good by itself
With hands
Soy sauce first

Filled with roe
Completely filled with roe
Wait, let me squeeze this out
[A crab waterfall...]
In 1 bite
[Touched]
This is no joke It's really delicious
Cut it like this
[I will film it so it stays this time...]
Cut it
So good
The meat!
Take the leg too
If you break the joint like this
These are much easier to eat
There's a way to eat all the meat

Take out the gill part over here There's more meat in here
Take this part
[And eat]
Rip it
Just like this
Just like that
[The owner seems busy with something...]
[Preparing wet towelettes for Tzuyang...]
Take the legs 1 by one just like this And it's easy to eat
What's this?
Wet wipes, thank you
Did you open it for me? Thank you!
Squeeze this one out
That's insane
I love it
It's easier to eat if it's cut in 3's

Now for the spicy!
These come with water celery and other vegetables
But I requested not to include those
[These are filled with roe as well...!]
Take the leg
These are a little spicy
Tastes very good
This one needs to be squeezed out
[She's still very good at eating...]
It's fun to squeeze them out
How do I explain? Almost like popping a zit
I want to continue watching her because it's been so long
She never ceases to amaze me
It's spicy
Some hot soup here
Take like 2 pieces of gim (dried seaweed)

Get 1 soy sauce crab
What? Look at this
In 1 bite!
It's time for the shell here
There's more to it
Scrape this out
All the guts and roe
What's this? Roe heaven?
How's there so much?
It's like spaghetti
Crazy!
Squeeze them out for more fun
The legs are filled with meat
The guts!
Now for the spicy
[Ta-da]

With some gim
[No need for words]
Can I possibly get some rice?
-How many would you like? -Just for 1 now, please
Thank you
It's time for some rice
[Some soup before the rice comes out...]
Thank you
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
There's this thing that I've been wanting to do
Gather all the meat in 1 place
Mix it up with rice and eat it
I've been wanting to do that
[You see this?]
These have a ridiculous amount of meat
[Completely focused]

This is like heaven
A taste of heaven
My dream has come true
Most of the time, raw crabs come with a lot of meat but not a lot of guts and roe
But look what I made here
Look at the visuals
Why am I so happy?
[Not paused...]
Some gim
Sprinkle it on top
Some flying fish roe
Some rice
More crab than rice
[Raw marinated crabs with rice...]
Egg yolk
Looks like a porridge

It'll be perfect with 1 more egg yolk
Let's put another 1 in
This is an expensive bowl of rice!
This is a taste of heaven
[Heaven is not too far away]
Going back and forth is great
The rice and soup back and forth
[Now for the spicy crabs]
I just had the soy sauce, so I'll eat the spicy now
The same way
I'm already excited
Let's take all of them this time
The leg meat squeezes out like this too
It's all done
I couldn't even tell because it's all red
The leg too

Construction complete
Surgery complete
It's such a relief though
I wore white the last time I was here The bear one
That shirt became a total mess
I'm not wearing white today
Good job, Jungwon
I'll cast a spell here
3 swirls of sesame oil
1, 2, 3
[Chop chop chop chop chop]
Egg yolk
The visuals
I don't want to mix it up
[But I must let you go...]
Get some rice like this

[I'd like to keep this in the fridge as a side dish...]
Same raw crabs, but tastes better
Ta-da
You finished it all
I keep finding myself looking at you
You're blessed
[A photo-time with the customers]
She's so good at eating
Thank you so much
The customers gave me this to drink Thank you!
This is random but,
I'll eat 1 chocolate cookie
Tasty~
[She's pretty popular today!]
She ate all of that...
[It doesn't make sense]

This needs some rice
Just like that
Looks delicious
I love it
Spicy raw crab rice!
[Uncontainable excitement]
Thank you
The owner was very nice to me when I first came here
And I'm grateful that he's taking really good care of me again
Let's get back to eating!
What pisses you off more?
Ruining your shirt with sauce or getting a piece of shell stuck on your teeth?
Both sound horrifying
Where did everything go?
The best
Just the raw meat without anything

Crab shell
1 last crab left
Instead of eating it plain,
Let's squeeze it out as a finale
Mix it all up using the shell
Come to think of it, I forgot to eat the shell-rice
So foolish
That's the most important one
Either way, Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
